body_storage_policy: exact non-secret macro specimen bodies plus standards-registry/type-plane and supporting kind-atlas/option-surface tool bodies are copied into Microcosm examples/source_modules; receipt bodies carry paths, hashes, counts, and verdicts only
source_open_payload_boundary: open source except keys, credentials, cookies, account/session state, provider payload bodies, browser/HUD live access, recipient-send state, and credential-equivalent material
anti_claim: This bundle imports a public executable-grammar metabolism specimen. It does not expose private standards engines, raw operator notes, provider transcripts, account/session state, publication authority, or clone-ready release authority.
